TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Botan_go, title = Botan_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Botan_go} }

S.FORM: Botan go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 173.85 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 78.01 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 67.38 km²), 4,619 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,806 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,318 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Botan go ays psgayun 6 ru 8 alang. 8 alang hani ga, Maljipa , Sinevaudjan , Macaran , Kus kus , Pungudan , Kapanan , Anteng , Draki . pinhknyan sraral kawas tay1874, minhtuw Botangsya' zikeng. kintzyux na Squliq rhzyal tay mkraya' na Botan go hya' ga Rayiyong go. tay mkyahu' na Botan go hya' ga Mansyu go. kayal tokusan 1. tokusan 2. tqinu 3. ryuhing 4. bgsyaw

Botan go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 173.85 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 78.01 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 67.38 km²), 4,619 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,806 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,318 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Botan go ays psgayun 6 ru 8 alang. 8 alang hani ga, Maljipa , Sinevaudjan , Macaran , Kus kus , Pungudan , Kapanan , Anteng , Draki . pinhknyan sraral kawas tay1874, minhtuw Botangsya' zikeng. kintzyux na Squliq rhzyal tay mkraya' na Botan go hya' ga Rayiyong go. tay mkyahu' na Botan go hya' ga Mansyu go. kayal tokusan 1. tokusan 2. tqinu 3. ryuhing 4. bgsyaw
S.PHON: βotan ɣo mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan, amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu βotan ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, maljipa , s~ɕine*au*jan , maʦ~ʨaran , kus~ɕ kus~ɕ , puŋu*an , kapanan , anteŋ , *raki . pinħknjan s~ɕraral kawas~ɕ taj****, minħtuw βotaŋs~ɕjaʔ zikeŋ. kintzjux na s~ɕquliq rħzjal taj mkrajaʔ na βotan ɣo ħjaʔ ɣa rajijoŋ ɣo. taj mkjaħuʔ na βotan ɣo ħjaʔ ɣa mans~ɕju ɣo. kajal tokus~ɕan *. tokus~ɕan *. tqinu *. rjuħiŋ *. βɣs~ɕjaw
